title.en: COMBINATION OR MULTI-PURPOSE TOOLS NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR; DETAILS OR COMPONENTS OF PORTABLE POWER-DRIVEN TOOLS NOT PARTICULARLY RELATED TO THE OPERATIONS PERFORMED AND NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR
with interchangeable or adjustable tool elements
wherein the elements are brought into working position by a pivoting or sliding movement
Associations of tools for different working operations with one portable power-drive means; Adapters therefor
